'''''Choose Your Own Star Wars Adventure: Return of the Jedi''''' trilogy, is a young reader novel by [[Christopher Golden]], published by [[Skylark]] on [[August 10]], [[1998]]. It is written from the second person point of view with the reader taking on the role of [[Luke Skywalker's best friend]], the protagonist of the story. The book features a number of points in which the reader can influence the story by deciding which page to turn to, resulting in multiple storylines and endings. The fate of the galaxy is in your hands — [[May the Force be with you/Legends|May the Force be with you]].

==Plot summary==
As with [[Choose Your Own Star Wars Adventure: The Empire Strikes Back|the last book]], although it allowed for multiple different endings, this book continues as if all the events from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] took place. You are Luke Skywalker's best friend, and you and [[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian|Lando Calrissian]] have infiltrated [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]'s palace as guards as Luke puts his plan into action to rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from Jabba's clutches. After that, you plan with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] to destroy [[Death Star II/Legends|the second Death Star]] and bring down the [[Galactic Empire]].

===Possible endings===
*Surrender to Jabba, who will release you for info on the Rebellion (all of the following are non-canon).
**Betray your friends to Jabba, who are imprisoned. You are released but subsequently shunned by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|the Rebellion]].
**Surrender to Jabba, refuse to give any information, and everyone gets fed to the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]].
*Follow Luke into the rancor pit and release the monster on the palace while you escape (all of the following are non-canon).
**Kill Jabba and you and Lando become slaves.
**Refuse to help [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] recapture Han. You and Lando become slaves.
**Pretend to help Boba Fett recapture Han and turn on the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], who will be imprisoned by the Rebellion for life.
*Try to help Lando escape the [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] but get eaten by it (non-canon).
*Join Lando Calrissian in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] to fight and destroy the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]].
*Help your friends on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] destroy the shield generator.
**Join Luke and Leia on the [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] chase and get captured by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] (non-canon).
**Stay with Han and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], befriend the Ewoks, and destroy the generator.
*Join Luke in the final battle against [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] and [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
**Stay on the light side while Luke falls to the dark side (non-canon).
**Fall to the dark side while Luke stays on the light. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] is redeemed and so are you.
